scripts.install:all: python -m pip install -e apps/api[dev] && cd apps/web && npm install
scripts.lint: cd apps/api && ruff check . && cd ../web && npm run lint
scripts.typecheck: cd apps/api && mypy raeburnai_executive && cd ../web && npm run typecheck
scripts.docker:build: docker build -f Dockerfile.api -t raeburnai-executive-api . && docker build -f Dockerfile.web -t raeburnai-executive-web .
